summary: Iteration 165: HotelRunner v2 Dry-Run Write Path implementation. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all 3 new panels rendering correctly: Dry-Run Kontrol (ARI Push, Chain Test, Failure Simulation buttons), Dry-Run Hata Dagilimi (failure breakdown), Write Acma Kriterleri (6 criteria panel).

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw keys (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue from iteration 161

critical_code_review_comments: Dry-run engine correctly implements production write path without side-effects (NO-OP external calls)
Outbox entries created with dry_run=True flag for traceability
Transaction verification works in read-only mode with fallback to simulated verification
Failure simulation supports 3 types: timeout, validation_error, rate_limit
Chain test correctly executes 3 steps (create, modify, cancel) with individual failure simulation support
Write enable criteria correctly checks 6 conditions: readiness_score>=90, drift<5, dry_run_success_rate>=95%, dlq=0, retry<5, chain_success
ops-dashboard endpoint correctly includes dry_run and write_criteria fields
All dry-run endpoints properly use tenant_id query parameter for multi-tenant support
Turkish language labels used throughout UI (Dry-Run Kontrol, Hata Dagilimi, Write Acma Kriterleri)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new UI components render and function correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing syroce_default tenant data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 165 verified all newly added HotelRunner v2 Dry-Run Write Path features. Backend endpoints tested: POST /dry-run/ari-push (dry-run ARI push with payload, outbox, verification), POST /dry-run/confirm-delivery (dry-run confirm delivery), POST /dry-run/chain (create/modify/cancel chain test - 3 steps), POST /dry-run/simulate-failure (timeout, validation_error, rate_limit simulation), GET /dry-run/results (execution history), GET /dry-run/stats (success rate, failure breakdown, chain stats), GET /dry-run/write-criteria (6 criteria check). Frontend at /hrv2-ops displays: Dry-Run Kontrol panel (ARI Push button, Chain Test button, Timeout/Validation/Rate Limit simulation buttons), Dry-Run Hata Dagilimi panel (failure breakdown by category), Write Acma Kriterleri panel (6 criteria with met/not-met status). All data-testid attributes verified: dry-run-panel, dry-run-ari-push-btn, dry-run-chain-btn, simulate-timeout-btn, simulate-validation_error-btn, simulate-rate_limit-btn, dry-run-failure-panel, write-criteria-panel, criteria-readiness_score, criteria-drift_low, criteria-dry_run_success_rate, criteria-dlq_empty, criteria-retry_stable, criteria-chain_success.

displays: Failure breakdown by category (timeout, validation, rate_limit)
Current value and required value for each criterion

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints backed by real HotelRunner API and MongoDB. Dry-run external calls are NO-OP by design (this is the feature, not a mock).
